keyEvents.text: Goal!  Bahamas 0, Trinidad and Tobago 1. Malcolm Shaw (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Duane Muckette.
Alexiou Cartwright (Bahamas) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Bahamas 0, Trinidad and Tobago 2. Alvin Jones (Trinidad and Tobago) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Bahamas 0, Trinidad and Tobago 3. Duane Muckette (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Reon Moore.

Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Nathaniel James replaces Reon Moore.

Second Half ends, Bahamas 1, Trinidad and Tobago 7.
